description: Create a new fire department record in CAMEO Data Manager for the Chatham Fire Protection District (ID: FD-2024-0173, Address: 100 East Mulberry Street, Chatham, IL 62629, Phone: (217) 483-2680, Contact: Chief Jeff Kaufmann). Associate this fire department with the existing facility 'Midwest Agricultural Chemicals LLC'. Document the association by creating a verification file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fd_verification.txt containing the department name, ID, associated facility, and status 'Complete'. Save a screenshot of the facility record showing the fire department association to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fd_association_proof.png.
